case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A VS. DONNA M HENDERSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-12-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DONNA HENDERSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $454.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100038565) AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON, DONNA M
